channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

item.title: Who’s to blame when AI commits a crime? - The Washington Post
Trump’s sons invest heavily in defense tech as father’s administration pours money in - The Washington Post
How AI wealth is reshaping San Francisco's housing market - Axios
